title: RealmiUtils
description: Useful things for the Realmi.fi server
body:
Enhance your Minecraft server experience with the ultimate home management system. With this mod, you can set up to **six homes** in **Realmi.fi**, seamlessly syncing them with your actual homes on the server.

Never again will you lose your way upon death. When unfortunate circumstances befall you, the mod acts as your loyal guide, swiftly notifying you of the precise coordinates where you met your demise. But that's not all! It goes the extra mile by calculating the closest home to those coordinates, ensuring a rapid return to safety and your valuable possessions.

But wait, there's more! Our mod integrates seamlessly with the existing Realmi.fi server command, allowing you to teleport directly to the nearest home with a simple click. Just look out for the informative message that appears, complete with an interactive onclick event. Click on the message, and you'll be whisked away to your closest home using the '/home <number>' command.

Experience true peace of mind and unparalleled convenience with the Realmi.fi Home Teleport Mod. Your homes become your anchors, effortlessly guiding you back to familiar surroundings, synced perfectly with your server adventures. Embark on epic quests, build magnificent structures, and conquer the realms, knowing that your homes are always there to welcome you back.
